raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I used XXXX XXXX XXXX to book a hotel reservation at The XXXX at XXXX for the dates : XX/XX/XXXX. - XX/XX/XXXX. I click pay after I screenshot the dates. Item XXXX in the uploaded attachment showed up when I clicked to pay. 
On XX/XX/XXXX. I saw an email from XXXX. The email showed a confirmed reservation {$2200.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. - XX/XX/XXXX. 
{$1400.00} - XXXX nights ( {$370.00} per night ) {$610.00} - Taxes and fees {$130.00} - Hotel Booking Protection On XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted XXXX to tell them I received reservations for the wrong dates. and XXXX refused to cancel my reservations. XXXX deliberately held the reservation until XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX tells me that I have to pay for a new reservation for the correct dates and then they will refund me my {$2200.00}. I express that I am not comfortable paying them again, I do not want to risk more money. Then XXXX tells me The XXXX at XXXX is sold out on XX/XX/XXXX. - XX/XX/XXXX. 
XXXX refused to send me a refund. 

I filled a claim with the Hotel Booking Protection I purchased through XXXX { XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX denied the claim. 

As of XX/XX/XXXX The XXXX at XXXX has not received any funds from XXXX. 

XXXX American Express removed the charge for {$2200.00}, then days later American Express put the charge of {$2200.00} back on my American Express account. 
I sent all this information to American Express, and it was explained to me that XXXX is XXXX of their biggest clients and I, XXXX XXXX was not. 
Please help me.
